content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Summit Tech Partners
Customer ID: C008
Contract ID: K024
Account Executive: James Okafor
Period: H2 2025 (July – December 2025)
Meeting Date: December 11, 2025
Attendees: James Okafor (AE), Alex Nguyen (CTO), Natalie Brooks (Head of Client Services), Maria Santos (Dedicated CSM), Jordan Kim (VP of Enterprise Sales)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Summit Tech closed 2025 with 48 managed services clients, up from 36 at the start of the year. Revenue grew 31% for the full year — the strongest growth rate since the company's founding. The enterprise sales motion is gaining traction with two Fortune 500 prospects in late-stage evaluation.

PLATFORM USAGE
35 of 35 licensed users active. Weekly report generation at 179 reports per week. White-label dashboards active for all 48 clients. Automated delivery at 97%.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- Jordan Kim presented the enterprise sales pipeline — two Fortune 500 prospects have asked specifically about InsightIQ's data volume capacity and SLA guarantees. James Okafor confirmed InsightIQ supports high-volume deployments and offered to provide an enterprise SLA addendum for the prospect evaluations
- Alex Nguyen raised the self-serve portal request again in the context of the Fortune 500 prospects — enterprise clients will not accept a shared link workaround. James Okafor shared that a limited client portal feature is now on the H1 2026 roadmap
- Maria Santos reported that her independent check-ins with Natalie Brooks have identified 3 underutilized features that could increase client value — scheduled a feature enablement session for January 2026
- 2026 renewal: Alex Nguyen expects to need 45 users by mid-2026 based on the enterprise pipeline

SATISFACTION RATING: 5/5
Jordan Kim: "If the client portal ships in H1 2026, this becomes a centerpiece of our enterprise sales pitch. That would be a significant moment for us."

ACTION ITEMS
- James Okafor to provide enterprise SLA addendum to Jordan Kim by December 20
- Maria Santos to run feature enablement session with Natalie Brooks in January 2026
- 2026 renewal proposal: 45 users + enterprise SLA terms to be prepared by March 2026
- James Okafor to confirm client portal H1 2026 delivery date in writing

NEXT QBR: July 2026
